timeline.title: Built My Foundation in Computer Applications
timeline.description: Completed my BCA while building a strong base in programming, web fundamentals, databases, and problem solving through academic and self-driven projects.

timeline.title: Started My Career in Backend Engineering
timeline.description: Worked at Square Bits, progressing from trainee to backend engineer and gaining practical experience in APIs, payments, automation, and production SaaS systems.

timeline.title: Shifted from Execution to Product Thinking
timeline.description: Chose to step back from employment and spend focused time exploring product direction, market pain points, and long-term technical growth.

timeline.title: Built the S3 Library Platform
timeline.description: Designed and developed a library management SaaS product around real operational problems such as subscriptions, branch workflows, and seat allocation.

timeline.title: Validated Ideas Through Real Operations
timeline.description: Stayed close to day-to-day library workflows to understand where software actually helps, what users resist, and how product assumptions change in real usage.

timeline.title: Paused the Product and Refocused
timeline.description: Put active development on hold to reassess priorities, strengthen fundamentals, and make more disciplined decisions about future products.

timeline.title: Expanded Into IoT and Embedded Systems
timeline.description: Began structured learning in microcontrollers, sensor interfacing, communication protocols, and hardware-software integration to broaden my engineering capability.

timeline.title: Building Toward Hybrid Software + Hardware Systems
timeline.description: Current focus is to combine strong full stack foundations with embedded and IoT skills to build practical systems that connect software with the physical world.
